message:
fix(ci): replace deprecated macos-13 runner with macos-15-intel

The macos-13 runner was fully deprecated in December 2025, causing the
x86_64-apple-darwin build to fail with "configuration not supported".
This single failure cascaded to block the entire create-release job,
resulting in v0.2.0 being published with zero binary assets.

Switch to macos-15-intel, the current GitHub-hosted Intel macOS runner.

Fixes #8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ jobs:
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             asset_name: toon-linux-arm64
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15-intel
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             asset_name: toon-darwin-amd64
           - os: macos-latest
